summary: Execute standalone TrackCenter for image231924_c01, the first bright interior candidate from the saved image region.
scientific_rationale: The project objective starts by finding a magnetic-field-aligned NV within the image231924 spatial range. The saved-image export selected image231924_c01 as the brightest isolated interior emitter candidate (X=113.000, Y=113.625, Z=115.000 um). TrackCenter is required to confirm current trackability and final counts before any resonance/alignment screen.
expected_evidence: terminal TrackCenter bridge result with tracked position and final_counts_kcps
job.json/status/result artifacts under the NV bridge queue
decision whether to run strong-pi pulsed ODMR on image231924_c01 or move to the next candidate
success_criteria: final counts are above the direct-helper minimum_final_kcps=8 and not a count-collapse anomaly
tracked position remains plausibly associated with the candidate seed
stop_conditions: bridge queue is not idle immediately before submission
project lifecycle is canceled or do_not_submit_or_mutate_bridge_queue is true
TrackCenter fails or final counts collapse, in which case this candidate is not advanced to pODMR without review

result.conclusion: TrackCenter passed; candidate is trackable with healthy counts, but magnetic-field alignment is still untested.
